chapter_title.en: The Prayer for Eclipses, Earthquakes, Winds, and Oppression and Their Causes

text: 1516 - وَقَالَ اَلصَّادِقُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: «إِنَّ اَلصَّاعِقَةَ تُصِيبُ اَلْمُؤْمِنَ وَ اَلْكَافِرَ وَ لاَ تُصِيبُ ذَاكِراً.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.1516 - Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) said:
"The lightning strike can affect both the believer and the disbeliever, but it does not strike one who is engaged in the remembrance (of Allah (swt))."
